message:
feat(widgets): Add page_up/page_down to Virtualized scrolling (bd-zlq9)

Adds page_up() and page_down() methods to both Virtualized<T> and
VirtualizedListState for complete momentum scrolling support:

- page_up(): Scroll up by visible count
- page_down(): Scroll down by visible count
- Tests for both Virtualized and VirtualizedListState

This completes the momentum scrolling acceptance criteria:
- ✓ Scroll by delta works
- ✓ Page up/down work
- ✓ Home/End work (scroll_to_top/scroll_to_bottom)
- ✓ Momentum scrolling smooth (fling/tick)
- ✓ Follow mode auto-scrolls on add
- ✓ Manual scroll cancels follow

Closes bd-zlq9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
